name: watch_domain
description: Add a domain to your snooze watchlist. The domain is monitored continuously and you get an email when its status changes or expiry approaches. Requires signing in to your snooze account.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: watch_domain · Public sink: watch_domain.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: watch_domain · Public sink: watch_domain

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
